build.description: build system or dependency tooling changes that should not publish a release by themselves

chore.description: repository maintenance that should not publish a release by itself

ci.description: continuous integration changes that should not publish a release by themselves

docs.description: documentation-only changes that should not publish a release by themselves

feat.description: user-visible functionality that increments the minor version

fix.description: user-visible fixes that increment the patch version

refactor.description: internal refactors that should not publish a release by themselves

style.description: formatting-only changes that should not publish a release by themselves

test.description: test-only changes that should not publish a release by themselves
